steps.title: Use Desmos to fit the table
steps.content: Enter the table points as lists: $x_1=[0,1,2]$ and $y_1=[22,23,24]$. Then type the linear regression row $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. Desmos gives $m=1$ and $b=22$, so the equation is $y=x+22$.

steps.title: Check the model against the table
steps.content: The model gives $y=22$ when $x=0$, $y=23$ when $x=1$, and $y=24$ when $x=2$. All three rows match, so the Desmos model is reliable.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A) $y=x+22$ — slope $1$, intercept $22$. Matches all three points.
  • B) $y=24x$ — at $x=0$ gives $y=0$, not $22$. Eliminated.
  • C) $y=24x+2$ — at $x=0$ gives $y=2$, not $22$. Eliminated.
  • D) $y=22x$ — at $x=0$ gives $y=0$, not $22$. Eliminated.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
